sections.paragraph:
fem. (from the masc. פֵּן, which see)-

(1) a corner, Pro 7:12 21:9 , and frequently. רֹאשׁ פִּנָּה Psa 118:22, and אֶבֶן פִּנָּה Job 38:6, a corner stone.

(2) a mural tower, such as were erected on the corners of walls, 2Ch 26:15 Zep 1:16.

(3) Metaph. used of a prince of a people, who is their defence, Isa 19:13 Zec 10:4 1Sa 14:38 Jud. 20:2 . Compare מָגֵן, בַּדִּים.
